title: Costera loheri
intro:
I couldn't find information about the Costera loheri plant. However, I found information about Costus loheri which is a plant species within the Costaceae family. 

Costus loheri is a plant species that belongs to the Costaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Costus loheri include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Costus loheri is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, which may be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory infections and fever.
